mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, p.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, p.PRODUCT_DESC AS productDesc, p.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, txn.CARRIER_CODE AS carrierCode, txn.INVOICE_NO AS invoiceNo, txn.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, PRODUCT_NO, CARRIER_CODE, INVOICE_NO FROM ( SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, PRODUCT_NO, CARRIER_CODE, INVOICE_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PRODUCT_NO ORDER BY TRANSACTION_ID DESC) AS rn FROM TRANSACTIONS ) WHERE rn = 1 ) txn ON txn.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_NO, IMG_URL FROM ( SELECT PRODUCT_NO, IMG_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PRODUCT_NO ORDER BY PRD_IMG_NO) AS rn FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO WHERE p.SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_NO DESC

SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, p.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, p.PRODUCT_DESC AS productDesc, p.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo, p.PRODUCT_CONDITION AS productCondition, p.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod FROM PRODUCTS p WHERE p.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND p.SELLER_EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT PRD_IMG_NO AS prdImgNo, PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, IMG_URL AS imgUrl, ORGFILENAME AS orgfilename, FILENAME AS filename, SORT_NO AS sortNo, IS_MAIN AS isMain FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRD_IMG_NO = #{prdImgNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_IMAGE (PRD_IMG_NO, PRODUCT_NO, IMG_URL, ORGFILENAME, FILENAME, SORT_NO, IS_MAIN) VALUES (#{prdImgNo}, #{productNo}, #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgfilename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNo}, #{isMain,jdbcType=CHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT_IMAGE SET IS_MAIN = 'N' WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PSO_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_SHIPPING_OPTION (OPTION_NO, PRODUCT_NO, PARCEL_TYPE, SHIPPING_FEE) VALUES (#{optionNo}, #{productNo}, #{parcelType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shippingFee})

SELECT SEQ_PML_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION (LOCATION_NO, PRODUCT_NO, PLACE_NAME, FULL_ADDRESS, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, SORT_NO) VALUES (#{locationNo}, #{productNo}, #{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fullAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{sortNo})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS WHERE PRODUCT_NUM = #{productNo}

SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, p.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM WISHLIST w JOIN PRODUCTS p ON w.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE w.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_NO DESC

SELECT ACCOUNT_ID AS accountId, EMAIL AS email, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCOUNT_NUM AS accountNum, ACCOUNT_HOLDER AS accountHolder, IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND IS_PRIMARY = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT ACCOUNT_ID AS accountId, EMAIL AS email, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCOUNT_NUM AS accountNum, ACCOUNT_HOLDER AS accountHolder, IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY IS_PRIMARY DESC, ACCOUNT_ID ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNTS (ACCOUNT_ID, EMAIL, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NUM, ACCOUNT_HOLDER, IS_PRIMARY) VALUES (SEQ_ACCOUNT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{email}, #{bankName}, #{accountNum}, #{accountHolder}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE ACCOUNT_ID = #{accountId} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT DELIVERY_NO AS deliveryNo, MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail, LABEL AS label, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, POSTCODE AS postcode, ADDRESS AS address, DETAILADDRESS AS detailAddress, EXTRAADDRESS AS extraAddress, IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY IS_PRIMARY DESC, DELIVERY_NO ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY_ADDRESS (DELIVERY_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, LABEL, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, DETAILADDRESS, EXTRAADDRESS, IS_PRIMARY) VALUES (SEQ_DELIVERY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{label}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{extraAddress}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.update: UPDATE DELIVERY_ADDRESS SET LABEL = #{label}, RECEIVER_NAME = #{receiverName}, RECEIVER_PHONE = #{receiverPhone}, POSTCODE = #{postcode}, ADDRESS = #{address}, DETAILADDRESS = #{detailAddress}, EXTRAADDRESS = #{extraAddress} WHERE DELIVERY_NO = #{deliveryNo} AND MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE DELIVERY_NO = #{deliveryNo} AND MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, t.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, t.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, TO_CHAR(t.TRADE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS tradeDate, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi WHERE pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS imgUrl, t.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, t.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, t.CARRIER_CODE AS carrierCode, t.INVOICE_NO AS invoiceNo, p.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, p.TRADE_STATUS AS productTradeStatus, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REVIEWS r WHERE r.TRANSACTION_ID = t.TRANSACTION_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview FROM TRANSACTIONS t JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO WHERE t.BUYER_EMAIL = #{email} AND t.PAY_STATUS != 'READY' ORDER BY t.TRADE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REVIEW_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REVIEWS (REVIEW_NO, WRITER_EMAIL, TARGET_EMAIL, TRANSACTION_ID, RATING, ONE_LINE_CAT, REVIEW_CONTENT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{writerEmail}, #{targetEmail}, #{transactionId}, #{rating}, #{oneLineCat}, #{reviewContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT r.REVIEW_NO AS reviewNo, r.WRITER_EMAIL AS writerEmail, r.RATING AS rating, r.ONE_LINE_CAT AS oneLineCat, r.REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, m.NICKNAME AS writerName, m.PROFILE_IMG AS writerProfileImg, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, pi.IMG_URL AS productImgUrl FROM REVIEWS r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.WRITER_EMAIL = m.EMAIL JOIN TRANSACTIONS t ON r.TRANSACTION_ID = t.TRANSACTION_ID JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE r.TARGET_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT r.REVIEW_NO AS reviewNo, r.TARGET_EMAIL AS targetEmail, r.RATING AS rating, r.ONE_LINE_CAT AS oneLineCat, r.REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, m.NICKNAME AS writerName, m.PROFILE_IMG AS writerProfileImg, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, pi.IMG_URL AS productImgUrl FROM REVIEWS r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.TARGET_EMAIL = m.EMAIL JOIN TRANSACTIONS t ON r.TRANSACTION_ID = t.TRANSACTION_ID JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE r.WRITER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS t JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO WHERE p.SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} AND t.USE_ESCROW = 'Y' AND t.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} AND TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료'

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS reportId, r.REPORT_DETAIL AS reportDetail, r.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, TO_CHAR(r.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reportDate, rt.TYPE_NAME AS typeName, rt.MAIN_CATEGORY AS mainCategory, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, m_reporter.NICKNAME AS reporterNickname, m_target.NICKNAME AS targetNickname FROM REPORTS r LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPES rt ON r.TYPE_ID = rt.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_NUM = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN MEMBER m_reporter ON m_reporter.EMAIL = r.REPORTER_EMAIL LEFT JOIN MEMBER m_target ON m_target.EMAIL = r.TARGET_EMAIL WHERE r.REPORTER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.REPORT_DATE DESC

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS reportId, r.REPORT_DETAIL AS reportDetail, r.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, TO_CHAR(r.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reportDate, rt.TYPE_NAME AS typeName, rt.MAIN_CATEGORY AS mainCategory, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, m_reporter.NICKNAME AS reporterNickname, m_target.NICKNAME AS targetNickname FROM REPORTS r LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPES rt ON r.TYPE_ID = rt.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_NUM = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN MEMBER m_reporter ON m_reporter.EMAIL = r.REPORTER_EMAIL LEFT JOIN MEMBER m_target ON m_target.EMAIL = r.TARGET_EMAIL WHERE r.TARGET_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.REPORT_DATE DESC

SELECT t.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, t.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, t.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, TO_CHAR(t.TRADE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS tradeDate, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, t.TRANSACTION_ID AS transactionId, t.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, p.CARRIER_CODE AS carrierCode, p.INVOICE_NO AS invoiceNo, /* ↓ 채팅 거래 추가 컬럼 */ cr.ROOM_ID AS roomId, cr.RESERVE_TIME AS reserveTime, cr.RESERVE_PLACE AS reservePlace, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REVIEWS r WHERE r.TRANSACTION_ID = t.TRANSACTION_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview FROM TRANSACTIONS t JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' /* ↓ 이 JOIN 추가 */ LEFT JOIN CHAT_ROOM cr ON cr.PRODUCT_NO = t.PRODUCT_NO AND cr.SELLER_EMAIL = t.SELLER_EMAIL AND cr.BUYER_EMAIL = t.BUYER_EMAIL WHERE t.BUYER_EMAIL = #{email} AND t.PAY_STATUS != 'READY' ORDER BY t.TRADE_DATE DESC
